free_text: Cross sections for reactions with 593 MeV and 540 MeV
protons in aluminium, arsenic, bromine, rubidium and
yttrium.  part 2.  As, Br, Rb and Y.

Al discs (0.5 mm thick, 3 cm diam.) attached to both
sides of the target samples used as beam monitors
Irradiated for 5 min, cooled for 15 min
- Targets 1 and 2 were relatively thin and separated
- An Al degrader was placed between targets 2 and 3.
- Targets 3 and 4 were separated 15 cm each other.
